settings.body: Canada's leading panel and systems furniture manufacturers — Teknion's panel systems and Global's divider solutions are proven in government offices and institutional environments province-wide.

settings.hero_subtitle: Acoustic panels, room dividers, and privacy screens that shape open institutional spaces. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: Open-plan offices need structure. Brant Business Interiors carries acoustic panels, room dividers, and privacy screens that manage noise, define zones, and give people a sense of place — all without permanent construction. OECM Agreement 2025-470. Free layout planning. Quote in 1 business day.
